name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.OSSLifecycleRule
description: OSSLifecycleRule specifies how to manage bucket's lifecycle

markDeletionAfterDays.description: MarkDeletionAfterDays is the number of days before we delete objects in the bucket

markInfrequentAccessAfterDays.description: MarkInfrequentAccessAfterDays is the number of days before we convert the objects in the bucket to Infrequent Access (IA) storage type
